metadata.title: O Sacred Head, Now Wounded
metadata.subtitle: Passion Chorale — Hassler/Bach harmonization, English tr. James Waddel Alexander (1830)
metadata.composer: Hans Leo Hassler (1564–1612), harmonization by J.S. Bach (1685–1750)
metadata.lyricist: Bernard of Clairvaux (1090–1153, Latin) → Paul Gerhardt (1607–1676, German) → James Waddel Alexander (1804–1859, English, 1830)
metadata.x_pd_basis: Bernard of Clairvaux (d. 1153), Gerhardt (d. 1676), Hassler (d. 1612), Bach (d. 1750), and Alexander (d. 1859) all died > 160 years ago
